name: Shaker Chicken and Noodle Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 cups diced cooked chicken (use thighs only - breasts are too tough)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1 cup of the stock, the vermouth, and butter in a large saucepan. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat.
2. Reduce the mixture to about 1/4 cup, achieving a syrupy consistency.
3. Stir in the cream and set aside.
4. In another saucepan, bring the remaining stock to a boil. Add the egg noodles and cook until tender, stirring occasionally (about 8-10 minutes).
5. While the noodles are cooking, blend the flour with water until smooth. Stir this mixture into the boiling noodles.
6. Continue cooking for 1-2 more minutes until the sauce thickens slightly.
7. Remove from heat and stir in the cream mixture, diced chicken, salt, pepper, chopped parsley, and tarragon (if using).
8. Adjust seasoning as needed before serving.
